channel.title: Technology on Whatever blog
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on Whatever blog

item.title: debian LXC搭建modsns
item.description: 修改于6/5/2023 搭建环境: PVE LXC debian 11, 网关clash(科学环境) 项目地址: https://github.com/IrineSistiana/mosdns 下载并copy 二进制文件mosdns到 /usr/bin/ 新建目录: /etc/mosdns, 下载并copy一众规则文件到该目录, 配置文件config.yaml也放这里 关闭systemd-resolved 1systemctl disable systemd-resolved 新建/etc/systemd/system/mosdns.service 1# /etc/systemd/system/mosdns.service 2[Unit] 3Description=A DNS forwarder 4ConditionFileIsExecutable=/usr/bin/mosdns 5 6[Service] 7User=root 8StartLimitInterval=5 9StartLimitBurst=10 10ExecStart=/usr/bin/mosdns "start" "-c" "/etc/mosdns/config.yaml" "-d" "/etc/mosdns" 11Restart=always 12RestartSec=120 13EnvironmentFile=-/etc/sysconfig/mosdns 14 15[Install] 16WantedBy=multi-user.target 17 18 19[Install] 20WantedBy=multi-user.target 开机自启/启动运行 1systemctl enable mosdns 2systemctl start mosdns 我个人的配置文件如下(v5), (不使用fallback, 仅以direct文件分流): 1## mosdns v5 conf 2 3 4log: 5 level: debug 6 # file: "/etc/mosdns/logs/mosdns.

item.title: Ros通过dhcp6下发ipv6 dns的设定
item.description: 修改于6/5/2023 1/ipv6 dhcp-server option 2 add code=23 name=dns value=0xfd80000000000000ccf2bbfffe0abcf1 此外, ros的ipv6-ND中不勾选advertise dns, 勾选other config.

item.title: debian搭建clash的透明代理
item.description: 修改于6/5/2023 一. clash程序 root运行 下载clash premium (https://github.com/Dreamacro/clash/releases/tag/premium) 解压保存为/usr/local/bin/clash 设置为systemd deamon 编辑/lib/systemd/system/clash.service 1#/lib/systemd/system/clash.service 2 3Description=A rule based proxy tunnel in Go 4After=network.target 5[Service] 6Type=simple 7Restart=on-abort 8ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/clash 9[Install] 10WantedBy=multi-user.target 默认运行目录为~/.config/clash, config.yaml要存放在工作目录中 1systemctl daemon-reload 2systemctl enable clash 二. 透明代理 开启ipv4/ipv6的转发 1echo "net.ipv4.ip_forward = 1" >> /etc/sysctl.conf && sysctl -p 2echo "net.ipv6.conf.all.forwarding = 1" >> /etc/sysctl.conf && sysctl -p 关闭systemd-resolved 服务, 让clash dns占有53端口 systemctl disable systemd-resolved /etc/reslov.conf里我是设置为主路由(ros)的dns iptables持久化 1apt install iptables-persistent netfilter-persistent 2netfilter-persistent save 3netfilter-persistent start 4iptables-save > /etc/iptables/rules.
